message:
fix: route aggregate queries through pipeline to prevent limit truncation

Aggregate queries with LIMIT were routed to scanPages(), which applied
the limit to the input scan instead of the output. This caused
COUNT(*) + LIMIT 1 to return 1 instead of the actual row count.

Fix both single-table and multi-fragment paths to use the pipeline when
aggregates are present, ensuring LIMIT applies after aggregation.

Also adds 11 schema validation tests covering compound filters, multiple
aggregates, groupBy combos, edge cases (zero/float limit, large offset).
